vector_recipe: 85 = concat[ mfcc.mean(20), mfcc.std(20), delta.mean(20), delta.std(20), spectral_centroid.mean, spectral_centroid.std, zcr.mean, zcr.std, duration_sec ]. MFCC over full clip. delta = librosa.feature.delta(mfcc, width=w) where w=min(9, nframes if odd else nframes-1), w>=3; if nframes<3 delta=0. spectral_centroid: librosa default (n_fft 2048, hop 512). zcr: librosa zero_crossing_rate default (frame 2048, hop 512). duration_sec = len(y)/sr.
